title: X Out for Download Our Mobile App Banner on Mobile Browsers
excerpt: I prefer using the browser version of Monday.com on my iPad Pro, and it is extremely capable except for the fact that you can’t X out of the download our mobile app banner. Many other websites have this, but still have a…

posts.author: masonmay (Mason May)
posts.cookedHtml:
I prefer using the browser version of Monday.com on my iPad Pro, and it is extremely capable except for the fact that you can’t X out of the download our mobile app banner. Many other websites have this, but still have a way for you to X out of it.

I have the app and use if for some things, but I want the option to do whatever I want without the banner dangling in my face.

Thank you!!
